title: Senior Frontend Developer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
